prompt:
HallTime Movie Network doctrine:
- This is not Dateline. Everybody in Blackthorn County has access to somewhere emotionally alarming.
- Suspicion is distributed infrastructure, not proof of guilt.
- The world is shared canon. Contradictions must be preserved, not fixed.
- Use lavish tokens. Be self-serious, atmospheric, melodramatic, and slightly broken.
- Return only valid JSON matching the requested schema.

Broadcast package:
Title: The Vineyard Lies Beneath Us
Universe: Blackthorn County
Mode: Mother Was Right All Along
Tagline: Inspired by something, probably.
Theme: Some homes hold families. Some hold motive.
Omen: a lake bell ringing without wind
Relationship dynamic: suspiciously healthy handyman friendship
Props: boat key, ceramic owl, unopened letter

Cast:
- Derek Bell | archetype=overextended_professional_woman | role=protagonist | job=regional marketing executive | threat_aura=0.37 | space=storage unit described as donation overflow | secrets=buried one traumatic detail under work for years
- Wyatt Marlowe | archetype=soft_spoken_menace | role=male_interest_or_threat | job=artisan developer | threat_aura=0.87 | space=storage unit described as seasonal materials | secrets=keeps duplicate keys for reasons framed as kindness
- Noah Hawthorne | archetype=chaotic_best_friend | role=best_friend | job=nurse with local intel | threat_aura=0.45 | space=side room with a space heater and old family records | secrets=knows about a half sibling no one asked for
- Mara Lark | archetype=mysterious_elegant_woman | role=elegant_wildcard | job=realtor | threat_aura=0.86 | space=meditation annex nobody uses in winter | secrets=inherited documents she should have burned; had brunch with someone officially deceased
- Rachel Winterson | archetype=divorced_redemption_dad | role=secondary_male_pressure | job=high school coach | threat_aura=0.43 | space=storage unit described as old family things | secrets=knows where evidence should have been
- Rachel Lark | archetype=intuitive_disaster | role=secondary_witness | job=local podcaster | threat_aura=0.5 | space=church basement described as seasonal materials | secrets=accused an innocent scamp and feels sick about it; saw the wrong person near the lake once and never shut up about it
- Tess Marlowe | archetype=daughter_with_hostile_divorce_attorney_soul | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a
- Brooke Mercer | archetype=deputy_with_emotional_damage | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a

Contradiction ledger:
- name drift: Wyatt Marlowe is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
- geography drift: Derek Bell says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
- mortality drift: A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
- property drift: The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Winter Hollow.

Seed dialogue:
- "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Wyatt?"
- "Mothers do not disappear, Tess. They evaporate into paperwork."
- "I checked his social media likes, Derek. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
- "The boat key is not decorative anymore and you know it."
- "Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Mara."
- "You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
- "If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
- "I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."
